title: P-OBSO — Pressure-gated Off-ball Scoring Opportunity
definition: OBSO = sum over the pitch of (attacker pitch-control x Expected Threat). The per-player value attributes each cell's OBSO to the OFF-BALL attacker who most controls it (carrier and GKs excluded). This is the one place in the Space series where space x threat belongs (the xT bridge). All other space metrics stay space-native.
units: P-OBSO = xT-weighted m^2 (pitch-control x xT). Player/team headline 'pobso' is the MEAN controlled-danger area held per frame (a stock). The xG receipt uses a FLOW unit (danger-moment rate). This is the only space metric that is NOT space-native -- it is the xT bridge.

honesty.tie_aware: bootstrap 95% CIs over sampled frames; players/teams whose CI overlaps the leader's are flagged tied_with_leader (no false single #1).
honesty.occlusion_gated: 38.7% of sampled player-positions were ESTIMATED (PFF occlusion, biased to fwds/wingers); each player tracks estimated_share and occlusion_flag.
honesty.pressure_gate: carrier pressure from PFF possessionEvents pressureType in {P,A,L}; pressured_share is the OBSO fraction generated while the on-ball carrier was being pressed.
honesty.stock_vs_flow: team mean OBSO (stock) is a poor xG predictor by design; the receipt correlates the danger-moment rate (flow) and reports the result honestly with CI.

section_spec.headline: Who owns the dangerous space when the ball isn't at their feet
section_spec.subhead: P-OBSO is the bridge: pitch control x Expected Threat. It scores the off-ball runner who controls the most valuable real estate the ball could profitably reach.
section_spec.viz_shows: The live control x xT surface for the hero play: a bright danger-pocket blooms ahead of an off-ball run, not at the ball. Player dots colored by team; ESTIMATED-position dots dimmed to disclose occlusion.
section_spec.interaction: Scrub the play; a 'reveal danger' toggle fades the ball-centric view and lights only cells the off-ball attackers control above an xT threshold, so you watch the scoring opportunity form before the pass exists. Hover a runner to see the m^2 of danger they own.

xg_receipt.unit: x = team P-OBSO danger-moment rate (controlled control x xT pockets per minute of possession); y = StatsBomb 2022 xG-for per match
xg_receipt.unit_x: danger-moments per minute of possession (control x xT pocket > 0.12)
xg_receipt.unit_y: StatsBomb open+set-play xG-for per match (2022 WC)
xg_receipt.reading: positive: teams that create more controlled-danger pockets off the ball tend to generate more xG-for.

teams.ci_basis: point estimate (1 match sampled; CI N/A)
